question_text: Explain why humans need to consume food containing chemical energy every day.
correct_answer: Humans need to consume food daily because the body continuously uses chemical energy from food for essential functions such as respiration, maintaining body temperature, growth, and movement. Energy is constantly released and dissipated as heat, so regular food consumption is necessary to maintain these vital processes.
explanation: Your body is always using energy, even when you're resting. Your heart beats, you breathe, and your body maintains its temperature - all these processes require energy from food. Unlike a battery that stores energy, your body can't store unlimited energy, so you need to eat regularly to replace the energy you use up every day.
